TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Ameenah_Gurib, title = Ameenah_Gurib, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ameenah_Gurib} }

S.FORM: = Ameenah Gurib = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 17 ka Ameenah Gurib ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Mauritus ta sayang o kiya ka Ameenah Gurib, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 6 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = aməənaħ guɾib = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka aməənaħ guɾib ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan mauɾitus ta sajaŋ o kija ka aməənaħ guɾib, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
S.FORM: = Ameenah Gurib = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 10 jiyax 17 ka Ameenah Gurib ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Mauritus ta sayang o kiya ka Ameenah Gurib, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 6 jiyax 5 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = aməənaħ guɾib = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka aməənaħ guɾib ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan mauɾitus ta sajaŋ o kija ka aməənaħ guɾib, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
